question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the chart data labels?

options.A: Apple has the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.B: Samsung has the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.C: Xiaomi has the largest market share among the brands shown.
options.D: Huawei has a larger share than Others.

explanation: From the labels, Samsung has the highest share (50%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Xiaomi is largest when relying on visual comparison.
